Goal: Make buyer browse location-aware without inventing data the backend cannot support.
MVP Scope: Define location request model: buyer location, radius miles, nationwide toggle, distance sort, and listing access label.
Backend/API Decisions: Add category-safe location params to feed/list APIs; support distance when seller/listing coordinates exist; fail gracefully to city/state labels.
Frontend Decisions: Add nearby/nationwide toggle, radius selector, distance sort, and card location/access label.
Acceptance Criteria: Nearby returns listings within radius; nationwide ignores radius; cards never show fake distance; no-results offers expand radius/nationwide.
Dependencies/Risks: Requires consistent seller/listing location data; coordinates may be missing for older seed records.

Goal: Verify current data has enough location fields for geo UX.
MVP Scope: Audit dealer/seller/listing location fields, seed data, API DTOs, and marketplace card types.
Backend/API Decisions: Recommend whether distance is computed from dealer coordinates, listing coordinates, or seller city/state fallback.
Frontend Decisions: Decide exact fallback copy when distance is unavailable.
Acceptance Criteria: Written mapping from available DB fields to card/detail location labels and radius filtering capability.
Dependencies/Risks: If coordinates are absent, MVP may need city/state-only nearby filter or seed backfill.

Goal: Upgrade browse from category-only filtering to useful keyword search and relevance.
MVP Scope: Define ListingQuery v1: keyword q, category slug, filters, sort=relevance, fallback sort, no-results relaxation.
Backend/API Decisions: Search title, make/model/category fields, seller name, generic schema searchable fields; return relevance sort only when q exists.
Frontend Decisions: One search input per category feed; keep category filters; show active search chip; clear search easily.
Acceptance Criteria: Keyword search works across automotive/trailers/boats; relevance sort appears only for search; empty states suggest relaxed filters.
Dependencies/Risks: Full-text index may be later; MVP can use SQL contains with bounded result size.

Goal: Turn local saved searches into a credible account feature without building notifications yet.
MVP Scope: Save named searches with filters/category; add alert-ready flag but no email/push delivery.
Backend/API Decisions: Define persistence model or defer server sync; clarify account requirement and category scope.
Frontend Decisions: Saved search manager: save, apply, rename/edit, remove; mark alerts as coming soon if backend not ready.
Acceptance Criteria: Users can save/apply/edit/remove searches per category; no misleading notification promise.
Dependencies/Risks: Auth/account readiness; local-only is insufficient for real alerts.

Goal: Add useful suggestions without overbuilding a search service.
MVP Scope: Suggest recent search terms, popular make/model/category terms, and seller names from current category.
Backend/API Decisions: Add lightweight /suggest endpoint or compute suggestions from current feed metadata.
Frontend Decisions: Combobox with keyboard support; no blocking dependency on suggestions.
Acceptance Criteria: Typing 2+ chars shows suggestions; selecting suggestion applies search; works empty/failure states.
Dependencies/Risks: Suggestion quality depends on seed/inventory volume.

Goal: Move filters toward schema-driven marketplace facets across categories.
MVP Scope: Add seller type, availability, fulfillment, and category feature facets only when backed by API fields.
Backend/API Decisions: Extend feed/list query with sellerType, availability, fulfillment, feature facets; return facet counts where cheap.
Frontend Decisions: Responsive filter drawer; chips show applied filters; unsupported facets hidden by category.
Acceptance Criteria: Filters are category-safe; no empty fake controls; applied filters are visible and removable.
Dependencies/Risks: Some features may require categorySchema filter roles before full support.

Goal: Add buyer value cues carefully without fake financing or untrusted pricing claims.
MVP Scope: Define placeholder-safe value badges and payment estimate rules; likely defer monthly payment until auto-specific finance model exists.
Backend/API Decisions: Only expose value badges when backed by price history/market benchmark; otherwise skip.
Frontend Decisions: Badge slot on cards/detail; never show Great Value unless source confidence is defined.
Acceptance Criteria: No unsupported finance claims; value badges are confidence-gated; payment estimate can remain deferred.
Dependencies/Risks: Market pricing data not consistently available yet.

Goal: Improve browsing speed on dense inventory without replacing card UI.
MVP Scope: Compact list view toggle and quick detail drawer for scan/review actions.
Backend/API Decisions: No new backend if card DTO has enough data; detail drawer may lazy-load detail endpoint.
Frontend Decisions: Mobile-first card remains default; desktop can toggle compact list; quick drawer shows media/specs/actions.
Acceptance Criteria: Users can switch grid/list; quick drawer opens from result without losing scroll position.
Dependencies/Risks: Drawer should not duplicate full VDP complexity.

Goal: Finish partial discovery features without pretending to have ML recommendations.
MVP Scope: Featured/pinned carousel from editorial config, new-arrivals rail/sort, similar rail clearly heuristic.
Backend/API Decisions: Optional editorial feature flag/source; similar query can stay same-category heuristic.
Frontend Decisions: Label rails plainly: Featured, New arrivals, More like this.
Acceptance Criteria: Rails appear only when enough data exists; no fake personalization claims.
Dependencies/Risks: Editorial config needs owner; similar quality improves later.
